playbook_template.script: Quote AWB {awb}. Last scan was {last_location} at {last_scan_time}. Need confirmation of the next transit movement before {needed_by}.
playbook_template.expected_outcome: A service representative checks the current hub and next leg assignment.

playbook_template.script: Subject: Urgent tracking help for AWB {awb}. Shipment last moved at {last_location} on {last_scan_time}. This shipment is needed by {needed_by} for {purpose}. Please confirm the next movement and recovery plan.
playbook_template.expected_outcome: Written escalation with an auditable case trail.

playbook_template.script: Submit a concise issue summary with masked reference {social_safe_awb}, last scan {last_location} at {last_scan_time}, and requested delivery deadline {needed_by}.
playbook_template.expected_outcome: Escalation reaches the digital support queue.

playbook_template.script: Share AWB {awb}. Ask for branch-level confirmation because the last visible event is {last_location} at {last_scan_time}.
playbook_template.expected_outcome: The support team validates branch ownership and next movement.

playbook_template.script: Subject: Shipment escalation for AWB {awb}. Last update is {last_location} at {last_scan_time}. The shipment is needed by {needed_by} for {purpose}. Please help with recovery.
playbook_template.expected_outcome: A ticket is created and routed to operations.

playbook_template.script: Provide AWB {awb} and request a manual lane check because the latest scan is {last_location} at {last_scan_time}.
playbook_template.expected_outcome: Support confirms whether the shipment is awaiting line-haul, delivery slotting, or exception handling.

playbook_template.script: Use masked reference {social_safe_awb} in public text. Mention last scan {last_location} at {last_scan_time}, deadline {needed_by}, and purpose {purpose}.
playbook_template.expected_outcome: A trackable Delhivery support query is logged.

playbook_template.script: Quote article number {awb}. Last scan shown is {last_location} at {last_scan_time}. Ask which Speed Post office currently owns the article.
playbook_template.expected_outcome: The agent confirms the controlling office or complaint route.

playbook_template.script: Submit masked reference {social_safe_awb}, last known event {last_location} at {last_scan_time}, and requested deadline {needed_by}.
playbook_template.expected_outcome: A formal complaint number is created for follow-up.
